insights: The market shows a clear upward trend in the last 10 days, consistently holding above the 30-day average of 992 jobs.
Growth is currently driven by FAANG+ and Unicorn tiers, suggesting that top-tier companies are resuming or increasing new graduate headcount despite broader economic uncertainty.
The 7-day average (1006) exceeding the 30-day average (992) indicates positive momentum, signaling a potential expansion phase for entry-level hiring over the next month.
